texto: Let's Look at Subjective Religious Experiences This Way:What if ten thousand people went up to a mountain top, saw something, and then they all disagreed with what they saw, even people who largely agreed with each other? Even with this best possible analogy to subjective religious experiences we would still have a reason to think the lack of oxygen caused them all to hallucinate.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de John W. Loftus que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “Let's Look at Subjective Religious Experiences This Way:What if ten thousand people went up to a …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, anecdotal-evidence, atheism, com foco em atheism e hallucination.
